faqs.question: Who can join CodeX?
faqs.answer: Any Quantum University student with an interest in technology can join CodeX. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced developer, you'll find opportunities to learn, build, and collaborate.

faqs.question: What activities does CodeX organize?
faqs.answer: CodeX organizes hackathons, coding competitions, technical workshops, speaker sessions, open-source initiatives, project collaborations, networking events, and weekly PROPS (Problem Solving) sessions where members practice DSA, competitive programming, interview questions, and collaborative problem-solving.

faqs.question: Do I need prior coding experience?
faqs.answer: No. We welcome students of all skill levels. If you're willing to learn and actively participate, our mentors and community will help you grow through practical projects and collaborative learning.

faqs.question: When are the weekly PROPS sessions held?
faqs.answer: We conduct a weekly PROPS (Problem Solving) session every Saturday from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM, where members solve coding problems, strengthen DSA concepts, prepare for coding interviews, and improve their problem-solving skills together.

faqs.question: Is there a membership fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. There is a one-time membership fee of ₹50. The entire amount is added to the club fund and is used to organize workshops, hackathons, coding contests, technical events, and other activities for our members.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of joining CodeX?
faqs.answer: As a member, you'll work on real-world projects, attend exclusive workshops, participate in hackathons and coding contests, receive mentorship, build a strong portfolio, expand your professional network, and gain practical experience that helps with internships and placements.

register.description: Initialize your profile and secure your position in the CodeX network.

about.title: Building the Next Generation of Innovators
about.description: CodeX is the official technical club of the Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Computer Applications at Quantum University, Roorkee. We empower students to learn, build, innovate, and collaborate through practical, hands-on experiences.
about.mission: Our mission is to create a thriving community where students transform ideas into real-world solutions. Through mentorship, live projects, hackathons, technical workshops, and competitive programming, we help members develop industry-ready skills, strengthen problem-solving abilities, and build impactful portfolios for internships, placements, and entrepreneurship.

activities.title: Projects & Open Source
activities.description: Build real-world applications, contribute to open-source projects, collaborate in teams, and gain practical development experience using modern technologies.

activities.title: Workshops & Weekly PROPS
activities.description: Attend expert-led workshops and participate in our weekly PROPS (Problem Solving) sessions focused on DSA, competitive programming, coding interviews, and logical thinking.

activities.title: Hackathons & Technical Events
activities.description: Compete in hackathons, coding contests, technical quizzes, project expos, and flagship events like CodeFest to challenge yourself and showcase your skills.

about.contact: Join our community, attend our events, or reach out at codex.club@quantumeducation.in. Follow us on Instagram @qu_codex for the latest updates.

contact.description: Have a question or want to collaborate? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
